meaning: n.赌徒,赌棍,体育比赛中不屈不挠者
examples: Has fortune dealt you some bad CARDS, then let wisdom make you a good gamester.
The gamester never plays the card the opponent expects, still less that which he wants.
Never did gamester, whose whole fortune is staked on one cast of the die, experience the anguish which Edmond felt in his paroxysms of hope.
